mapper.select: SELECT id as id, member_id AS userId, meal_time AS mealTime, meal AS mealType, description AS mealName, image_url AS imageUrl, calories, protein, carbs, fat, totcalorie, meal_date AS mealDate FROM meal_log WHERE member_id = #{userId} AND meal_date = #{date}

SELECT id as id, member_id AS userId, meal_time AS mealTime, meal AS mealType, description AS mealName, image_url AS imageUrl, calories, protein, carbs, fat, totcalorie, meal_date AS mealDate FROM meal_log WHERE member_id = #{userId} AND meal_date BETWEEN #{monday} AND #{sunday} ORDER BY meal_date
